
Equivalent manual steps (smith):
  1. Check that required tools are installed (git, VS Code, PowerShell)
  2. Verify VS Code settings for Copilot agent mode
  3. Validate .forge.json and file counts per preset
  4. Check version currency against Plan Forge source
  5. Scan for common problems (duplicates, orphans, broken references)


<<<<<<< Updated upstream
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║       Plan Forge — The Smith                                  ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

Environment:
  ✅ git 2.53.0.windows.3
  ✅ code (VS Code CLI) found
  ✅ PowerShell 7.6.1 (pwsh)
  ✅ gh (GitHub CLI) 2.92.0

Runtime & Worker Readiness:
  ✅ git v2.53.0
  ✅ gh v2.92.0
  ✅ node v24.11.1
  ✅ pwsh v7.6.1
  ✅ gh-copilot v1.0.49 (agentic capable)
  ⚠️  claude not found on PATH (agent worker)
     FIX: winget install Anthropic.Claude   (or npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code)
  ❌ copilot-coding-agent v lacks agentic flags: Logged in to github.com (issue #28)
     FIX: winget upgrade --id GitHub.cli && gh auth login
  ⚠️  codex not found on PATH (agent worker)
     FIX: npm install -g @openai/codex

VS Code Configuration:
  ✅ chat.agent.enabled (default — OK)
  ⚠️  chat.useCustomizationsInParentRepositories not set
     FIX: Add "chat.useCustomizationsInParentRepositories": true to .vscode/settings.json
  ⚠️  chat.promptFiles not set
     FIX: Add "chat.promptFiles": true to .vscode/settings.json

Setup Health:
  ❌ .forge.json not found
     FIX: Run 'pforge init' to bootstrap your project
  ✅ .github/copilot-instructions.md exists

Version Currency:
  ⚠️  Cannot determine installed version (.forge.json missing templateVersion)
     (cached 98m ago)

Auto-update:
  ✅ Auto-update: disabled (opt-in) | Cache age: no cache | Last tag: unknown | Last check: never
     Tip: Run 'pforge self-update' to check + install, or 'pforge smith --refresh-version-cache' to clear cache

MCP Server:
  ✅ pforge-mcp/server.mjs exists
  ✅ MCP dependencies installed
  ✅ .vscode/mcp.json has 'plan-forge' server entry

Image Generation:
  ✅ sharp installed (WebP, PNG, AVIF conversion)
  ✅ XAI_API_KEY set (Grok Aurora)
  ✅ OPENAI_API_KEY not set (DALL-E unavailable — optional)
  ✅ Node.js v24.11.1 (sharp requires >= 18.17)

MCP Runtime:
  ✅ MCP SDK (protocol layer) v1.29.0
  ✅ Express (dashboard + REST API) v5.2.1
  ✅ ws (WebSocket hub for real-time events) v8.20.0
  ✅ Playwright (screenshot capture)
  ✅ MCP server version v3.7.0 matches VERSION file
  ✅ forge-master-routes.mjs (Phase-29 route wiring)
  ✅ tools.json + cli-schema.json (92 MCP tools registered)

Dashboard:
  ✅ dashboard/index.html
  ✅ dashboard/app.js
  ✅ dashboard/forge-master.js (Forge-Master Studio tab)

Lifecycle Hooks:
  ✅ 8/8 lifecycle hooks present (core + LiveGuard)

Extensions:
  ✅ Extension catalog valid (1 extension(s))
  ✅ Spec Kit compatible

Version & Changelog:
  ✅ VERSION: 3.7.0
  ✅ CHANGELOG.md present (framework v3.7.0 — downstream CHANGELOG tracks your app, not pforge)

Common Problems:
  ✅ No common problems detected

Orchestrator:
  ✅ Orchestrator ready — use 'pforge run-plan <plan>' to execute a plan
  ✅ pforge-mcp/orchestrator.mjs present

Intelligence:
  ✅ 92 MCP tools (14 LiveGuard) in tools.json

Crucible:
  ✅ Crucible inactive — no .forge/crucible/ directory yet

Tempering:
  ✅ Tempering inactive — no .forge/tempering/ directory yet

Bug Registry:
  ✅ Bug registry inactive — no .forge/bugs/ directory yet

Notifications:
  ✅ No .forge.json — notifications inactive (optional)

Timeline / Search sources:
  ✅ 0 of 6 L2 source(s) with indexable events
